samples.xml_description:
Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding. 8-bit input operand A (multiplicand). 8-bit input operand B (multiplier). 16-bit output for the product. Algorithm=Shift and Add Multiplier=8bit Product=16bit

Initialize the product to zero.

For each bit of the multiplier (B):

  1. If the multiplier bit is set (1), add the multiplicand (A) to the product.
  2. Shift the multiplicand (A) left by one bit.

After processing all bits of the multiplier, the product will be the result of multiplying A and B.

Initialize the product to zero.

For each bit of the multiplier (B):

  1. If the multiplier bit is set (1), add the multiplicand (A) to the product.
  2. Shift the multiplicand (A) left by one bit.

After processing all bits of the multiplier, the product will be the result of multiplying A and B.
